items.name: sairam-tokens
items.title: Sai Ram Labs Design Tokens
items.description: Cosmic+bookish baseline: Fraunces+JetBrains Mono, indigo-violet palette, generous spacing, motion vars.

items.name: status-badge
items.title: Status Badge
items.description: Pill badge mapping status strings (ingesting/ready/failed) to color+pulse config.

items.name: skeleton-block
items.title: Skeleton Block
items.description: Shimmer skeleton placeholder with configurable height/width. Shimmer keyframes self-contained.

items.name: inline-error
items.title: Inline Error
items.description: Inline error banner with optional retry and dismiss actions.

items.name: tab-bar
items.title: Tab Bar
items.description: Generic tab bar. Pass tabs array with key+label; caller controls active state.

items.name: theme-chip
items.title: Theme Chip
items.description: Small pill label for tags, themes, and categories. Mono font, muted color.

items.name: pull-quote
items.title: Pull Quote
items.description: Indented blockquote with left accent border in the Sai Ram Labs indigo-violet.

items.name: empty-state
items.title: Empty State
items.description: Display-headline empty state with subtext and optional action slot. Optical-size treatment at 768px+.

items.name: card-with-meta
items.title: Card With Meta
items.description: Generic content card with title, meta row, cover image slot, actions row, and optional href link.
